title: Podman logo on Mac installer does not render well
body:
### Issue Description

The Podman logo on the Mac OS installer does not render well (see attached screenshot).

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f4d5ff30-e4fb-4494-8ca5-c6d786a38517)

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Install Podman on Mac OS.


### Describe the results you received

The logo does not render correctly making the installer look less appealing.

### Describe the results you expected

The logo should render correctly.

### podman info output

```yaml
OS: darwin/arm64
buildOrigin: pkginstaller
provider: applehv
version: 5.4.0
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: @vrothberg Hmm, it looks fine to me, using both the release pkginstaller and a build from scratch. Are you using an external monitor with a different resolution than the laptop screen? I updated the logo anyway, could you try [this](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/releases/download/v5.5.0-dev/podman-installer-macos-arm64.pkg) and see if its any better? It's unsigned though so you may need to approve it in your privacy & security settings.

Thanks for looking into it, @ashley-cui !  Yes, I have an external monitor with a different resolution.

I think it looks better, but I am still getting artifacts:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/485e945b-9068-466a-bc40-73b6c1f9e9b1)
